purpose: Backend model prompt contracts for PDF translation/backfill workflow decisions.

global_policies.anti_overfit: Never branch on sample filename, known page number, exact known text, fixed coordinates, fixed colors, or known document identity. Use extracted evidence only for the current run.
global_policies.truthfulness: If the required evidence is missing, return NEEDS_EVIDENCE or FAIL; do not invent observations.
global_policies.product_quality: In product_quality mode, semantic translations must be validated before generation; blocking quality failures must route to a repair loop, S_FAIL_QUALITY, or S_FAIL_CAPABILITY.
